# Etra: Names & Cultures — Fantasy ruler titles (Monarchy)
# Generated by generate_titles.py
#
# When game rule = Fantasy Languages and government = Monarchy,
# ruler titles (Emperor/King/Duke/Count) display in the
# ruler's culture/dialect language.
#
# Entries are added to country_flavor and evaluated before
# the base game's default entries (file loads first via 00_ prefix).

country_flavor = {
	type = country

	# === SPECIFIC DIALECT ENTRIES ===

	# --- ARDRAINIC ---
	# Ardrainic — Sittadellian
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_sittadellian
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sittadellian_dialect }
		}
	}
	# Ardrainic — Sittadellian
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_kingdom_sittadellian
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_kingdom = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sittadellian_dialect }
		}

	# Torrent — Naurmen
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_duchy_naurmen
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_duchy = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:naurmen_dialect }
		}
	}

			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sordrenic_language }
		}
	}
	# Moran — Moran
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:moran_language }
		}
	}
	# Moran — Moran (also: early_moran_dialect)

	# Hravevi — Hravevi
	text = {

		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_duchy = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:hravevi_language }
		}
	}
	# Hravevi — Hravevi
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_county_hravevi
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:hravevi_language }
		}
	}

	# ============================================================
	# THEOCRACY / REPUBLIC / ORDER — generated by generate_ruler_titles.py
	# ORDER before THEOCRACY: both match government_type:theocracy
	# but ORDER has extra has_reform trigger. First match wins.
	# ============================================================

	# ============================
	# ORDER
	# ============================

	# --- ARDRAINIC ---
	# ARDRAINIC — Sittadellian
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_sittadellian_order
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sittadellian_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_kingdom_sittadellian_order
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_kingdom = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sittadellian_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_duchy_sittadellian_order
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_duchy = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sittadellian_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_county_sittadellian_order
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sittadellian_dialect }
		}

			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_duchy = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sorlkol_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_county_sorlkol_order
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sorlkol_dialect }
		}
	}

			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_kingdom = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:central_torrentor_dialect }
		}
	}

			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:thanok_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_county_vulgar_moran_order
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:fluviolander_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_county_vulgar_moran_order
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:fioranelle_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_county_vulgar_moran_order
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:marcheur_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_county_vulgar_moran_order
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:rattolini_dialect }
		}
	}

	# --- FALLBACK — ARMONORICAN ---
	# FALLBACK — ARMONORICAN — Armonorican

		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_armonorican_order

			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform

	# --- FALLBACK — HRAVEVI ---

	# ============================
	# THEOCRACY
	# ============================

	# --- ARDRAINIC ---
	# ARDRAINIC — Sittadellian
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_sittadellian_theocracy
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sittadellian_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_kingdom_sittadellian_theocracy
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_kingdom = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sittadellian_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_duchy_sittadellian_theocracy
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_duchy = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sittadellian_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_county_sittadellian_theocracy
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sittadellian_dialect }
		}
	}

			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy

			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_kingdom = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:fullhorner_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_duchy_fullhorner_theocracy
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_duchy = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:fullhorner_dialect }
		}

	text = {

			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy

			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:fullhorner_dialect }

	# --- SORDRENIC ---
	# SORDRENIC — Stone Sordrenic
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_stone_sordrenic_theocracy
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:stone_sordrenic_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_kingdom_stone_sordrenic_theocracy
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_kingdom = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:stone_sordrenic_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_duchy_stone_sordrenic_theocracy
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_duchy = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:stone_sordrenic_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_county_stone_sordrenic_theocracy
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:stone_sordrenic_dialect }
		}
	}

		localization_key = etra_rank_county_pantagrin_theocracy
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:pantagrin_sordrenic_dialect }
		}
	}

	# --- ARMONORICAN (specific cultures) ---
	# ARMONORICAN (specific cultures) — Aggeuios
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_aggeuios_theocracy
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture = culture:aggeuios_culture }
		}

			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:fioranelle_dialect }
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_draquatin_republic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:republic
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:draquatin_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_kingdom_draquatin_republic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_kingdom = yes
			government_type = government_type:republic
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:draquatin_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_duchy_draquatin_republic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_duchy = yes
			government_type = government_type:republic
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:draquatin_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_county_draquatin_republic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:republic
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:draquatin_dialect }
		}
	}

			country_rank_is_duchy = yes
			government_type = government_type:republic
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:lutin_sordrenic_dialect }
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_county_lutin_republic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:republic
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:lutin_sordrenic_dialect }

	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_kingdom_vulgar_moran_republic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_kingdom = yes
			government_type = government_type:republic
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:fioranelle_dialect }
		}

	# --- FALLBACK — ARMONORICAN ---
	# FALLBACK — ARMONORICAN — Armonorican
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_armonorican_republic
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:republic
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:armonorican_dialect }
		}

	# --- FALLBACK — HRAVEVI ---

	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_hravevi_republic

			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
